ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the software component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of software component (e.g., portlet, action, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., development, testing, production) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software component being tested */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "testable" INTEGER /* Whether the test case is testable or not */,
  "test_protocol" TEXT /* Testing protocol used */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "test_configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES software_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_configuration_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "test_suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "test_protocol" TEXT /* Testing protocol used */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "test_configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test suite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_test_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_configuration_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suite_components" (
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_suite_id", "component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail, error) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was run */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "test_configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_configuration_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("test_suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the test configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environment_configurations" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id", "configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the framework */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, run test) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_test_suites" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id", "test_suite_id")
)
